title: Legend's Optimized
description: Performance, experience and optimization. That's Legend's Optimized
body:
# WELCOME TO LEGEND'S OPTIMIZED PROJECT!

### **OFFICIAL SUPPORT**: Choose your favorite version! We now have a support version for **SURVIVAL** and **BUILDER**!
****[BUILDER VERSION](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legends-optimized-for-builder)****

****[SURVIVAL VERSION](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legends-optimized-for-builder)****

**_Through a top selection of performance mod experts, we have compiled them to provide the most optimal performance and the best experience when playing Minecraft._**

### A NEW GENERATION, ENHANCED EXPERIENCE WITH MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE

In version 1.1, Macbook Air 2018 received up to ****300FPS at 6 Chunks rendering distance**** - something that seemed ****impossible for Intel Macbook Air****

### ENHANCE YOUR EXPERIENCE WITH AMBIENT SOUNDS WITH ULTIMATE PERFORMANCE

Play Minecraft with 360° Ambient Audio and Sound Physic Remastered. Experience the realism, down to the finest detail. Everything is beautifully remastered, from plains to mountains, from the ground to caves.
 
With Legend Optimized Modpack, Macbook Air 2018 with Intel UHD Graphics 617 (An extremely weak built-in GPU is featured on the Intel i5 8210Y) achieved ****190-300FPS at 6 CHUNKS**** rendering distance, ****THREE**** times higher than Minecraft Vanilla (Only 90-100FPS at 6 CHUNKS rendering distance)
But that's not all...

****Tested by us on Macbook Air 2018 (Intel Core i5 8210Y with Intel UHD Graphics 617)****

![Compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34473c3356de6879dbff964db31ca97e65577dab.jpeg)
_**The performance difference is so great that even we had to say "WAIT, WHAT?". Shows how much better optimized version 1.1 and above is than all previous versions!**_
### OPTIMIZE PERFORMANCE AND EXPERIENCE WITH SHADERS!
**With Photon Shader (Max Settings) and the UltimaCraft Resource Packs, the Macbook Air 2018, even though the CPU/GPU temperature is very hot, shows that this Macbook can still run shaders at ****2.5K resolution**** and handle heavy graphics tasks with PBR.**

****Photon Shader + UltimaCraft****
![Photon Shader + UltimaCraft PBR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10be0eab0316a91feef26855b53f0f1049e03a5e.jpeg)
![Photon Shader + UltimaCraft PBR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4513eb8f7e17c90de529c9519eb05302ec178e9.jpeg)

### DO YOU WANT TO RECORD MINECRAFT'S MOST BEAUTIFUL MOMENTS? THIS MODPACK IS EQUIPPED WITH REPLAY MOD!
Capture your most beautiful, perfect, and awesome moments in Minecraft with Replay Mod! Use it to create epic videos, creations, builds, or tutorials; we are sure it will not disappoint you!


If there are any problems with this modpack, please report to us [here](https://forms.gle/k8g3EYZHBqbBBiv6A)
or you can donate us through [Github Sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/LGVs-Team)

**Note: Legend's Optimized version 1.0.7 is not equipped with AmbientSounds and Sound Physics Remastered due to a conflict that causes Minecraft to crash.**
**Temporarily removed Replay Mod due to performance issues from below 1.1 version (*Legend's Optimize Standard*)**

****Legend Victory TEAM sincerely thanks the mods authors and other modpack creators who inspired this modpack.****
